# Product Requirements

## Summary

This document describes the product concepts, including the part detail page.

## Part detail page

The part detail page has an overview tab and a history tab. The overview tab
summarises the part; the exact cards it renders live in the frontend
components under src/app and src/components.

## Catalog setup

How teams set up their catalog before importing parts.

## Units and currencies

How units and currencies are configured.
